text: BREAKING: Kumakalat online na umatras na raw si Candidate A sa city debate matapos umanong madiskubre ang isang lihim na survey. I-share ito agad bago burahin!

explanation.summary: This post looks suspicious because it uses urgency, provides no verifiable source, and makes a strong claim about Candidate A without evidence.
signals: No linked source, document, or official statement
The claim conflicts with the known debate schedule and candidate records
what_to_do: Check the official debate organizer announcement or city election bulletin.
Look for multiple independent reports before sharing.
Treat screenshots and anonymous survey claims as unverified until confirmed.

linked_blue_truth.text: All debate schedules and city election notices in San Isidro City are posted on the official election bulletin and city website.

classification.explanation: The claim conflicts with the known debate schedule and should be treated as misinformation until independently verified.
